extension.summary: Browse, download, and launch games from your RomM server
extension.description: The RomM Game Launcher browses your self-hosted RomM (https://romm.app) ROM library from Kodi. Pick a platform, pick a game, and it downloads the ROM from your server and hands it to RetroPlayer (or whatever game addon you have configured). Modeled on the menu structure of the Internet Archive Game Launcher (IAGL), but backed by your own RomM server instead of archive.org.
